summary: Pipeline Architecture Overhaul VERIFIED - ALL 30 BACKEND TESTS PASSED + FRONTEND VERIFIED. Major refactor: Stage orchestrator (execute_pipeline, process_next_stage), retry/cancel endpoints, per-stage failure states (FAILED_PLANNING, FAILED_IMAGES, FAILED_TTS, FAILED_RENDER), status response with retry_info/credits_refunded/error_code, state machine transitions, cost guard (enforce_runtime_budget, BudgetExceededError), deterministic fallback for planning, recovery daemon running.
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline.py: execute_pipeline() loop calls process_next_stage() for each stage - VERIFIED (line 191)
pipeline.py: process_next_stage() independently callable by orchestrator or recovery daemon - VERIFIED (line 217)
pipeline.py: _refund_credits() idempotent credit refund on terminal failure - VERIFIED (line 829)
pipeline.py: STAGE_FUNCTIONS dict maps states to stage execution functions - VERIFIED (line 813)
state_machine.py: STAGE_ORDER defines pipeline sequence - VERIFIED (line 39)
state_machine.py: FAILURE_TO_RETRY maps failure states to retry stages - VERIFIED (line 63)
state_machine.py: can_transition() validates state transitions - VERIFIED (line 140)
state_machine.py: HEARTBEAT_THRESHOLDS per stage (30-600s) - VERIFIED (line 83)
schemas.py: FAILED_PLANNING, FAILED_IMAGES, FAILED_TTS, FAILED_RENDER states - VERIFIED (lines 52-55)
schemas.py: PER_STAGE_FAILURE_STATES set for quick membership checks - VERIFIED (lines 76-79)
schemas.py: ErrorCode enum with structured error codes - VERIFIED (lines 15-32)
cost_guard.py: BudgetExceededError raised when over budget - VERIFIED (line 89)
cost_guard.py: enforce_runtime_budget() called before every external call - VERIFIED (line 99)
cost_guard.py: pre_flight_check() returns CostEstimate with sufficient/shortfall - VERIFIED (line 51)
recovery_daemon.py: start_recovery_daemon() runs every 2 minutes - VERIFIED (line 29)
recovery_daemon.py: _recover_stale_jobs() finds stale heartbeats and requeues - VERIFIED (line 51)
planning_llm.py: generate_episode_plan_with_fallback() 4-level fallback chain - VERIFIED (line 159)
planning_llm.py: _deterministic_scene_splitter() no-LLM fallback - VERIFIED (line 327)
story_engine_routes.py: POST /retry/{job_id} returns 404 for nonexistent, 400 for non-retryable - VERIFIED (line 664)
story_engine_routes.py: POST /cancel/{job_id} returns 404 for nonexistent, works for active - VERIFIED (line 723)
story_engine_routes.py: GET /status/{job_id} returns retry_info object - VERIFIED (lines 554-561)
StoryVideoPipeline.js: RetryButton component exists - VERIFIED (line 1157)
StoryVideoPipeline.js: CancelButton component exists - VERIFIED (line 1181)
StoryVideoPipeline.js: PostGenPhase shows retry/cancel when canRetry is true - VERIFIED (line 1209)
ProgressiveGeneration.js: Shows retry attempt info in status message - VERIFIED (lines 339-348)
ProgressiveGeneration.js: Shows 'Recovering stuck job' when daemon recovers - VERIFIED (line 348)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and jobs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Architecture Overhaul fully verified. Key findings: 1) Stage orchestrator replaces monolithic run_pipeline() with execute_pipeline() loop calling process_next_stage(), 2) Per-stage failure states (FAILED_PLANNING, FAILED_IMAGES, FAILED_TTS, FAILED_RENDER) allow retrying from exact failed stage, 3) Recovery daemon runs every 2 minutes finding stale heartbeats (verified in logs: '[RECOVERY] Stale job detected'), 4) Multi-level fallback for planning: GPT-4o-mini full -> GPT-4o-mini reduced -> gemini-2.0-flash -> deterministic splitter, 5) Idempotent credit refund on terminal failure, 6) Status response includes retry_info with can_retry, current_attempt, heartbeat_detail fields, 7) Rate limit warning still shows friendly 'All rendering slots are busy' text (regression verified).

stage_orchestrator_execute_pipeline.details: execute_pipeline() loop processes stages one at a time until terminal

stage_orchestrator_process_next_stage.details: process_next_stage() independently callable by orchestrator or recovery daemon

status_retry_info_object.details: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns retry_info with can_retry, current_attempt, heartbeat_detail

per_stage_failure_states.details: FAILED_PLANNING, FAILED_IMAGES, FAILED_TTS, FAILED_RENDER in engine_state field

credits_refunded_field.details: credits_refunded field present in status response

error_code_field.details: error_code field present in status response for failed jobs

recovery_daemon_running.details: Recovery daemon logs '[RECOVERY]' messages in backend logs

deterministic_fallback_valid_plan.details: _deterministic_scene_splitter produces valid plan with title, scene_breakdown, character_arcs

budget_exceeded_error.details: enforce_runtime_budget raises BudgetExceededError for over-budget scenarios

state_machine_valid_transitions.details: PLANNING -> BUILDING_CHARACTER_CONTEXT is valid, PLANNING -> READY is invalid

postgen_retry_cancel_buttons.details: PostGenPhase shows retry/cancel buttons when canRetry is true

progressive_generation_retry_info.details: ProgressiveGeneration.js displays retry attempt info in status message

rate_limit_friendly_text_regression.details: Rate limit warning still shows friendly 'All rendering slots are busy' text

stage_orchestrator.stage_functions: STAGE_FUNCTIONS dict maps JobState to async stage functions

state_machine.valid_transitions: VALID_TRANSITIONS dict enforces strict state transitions
state_machine.failure_mapping: FAILURE_TO_RETRY maps failure states to retry stages
state_machine.heartbeat: update_heartbeat() called during active stage processing

recovery_daemon.detection: Finds jobs with stale heartbeats based on HEARTBEAT_THRESHOLDS
recovery_daemon.action: Requeues stage or marks terminal failure + refund
